owner_source: Tucson Association of Executives lists David Goff as member representative and says owner David Goff is a licensed architect who founded the business in 1999; BBB says the service operates under owner/architect David Goff; Real Producers lists David Goff as Architect / Owner.
source_query: Tucson AZ flooring public business listing
source_evidence: Overpass surfaced Floor Plans First in a flooring lane, but public evidence shows it is a floor-plan measurement and real-estate marketing service rather than a flooring contractor. Official site and contact page list 1016 W Prince Rd, Tucson AZ, David@floorplansfirst.com, voice (520) 881-1500, and toll-free (877) 887-1500. BBB verifies Floor Plans First LLC as a Tucson real-estate consultant with A+ rating and describes owner/architect David Goff measuring and drawing floor plans for residential or commercial buildings. Tucson Association of Executives lists David Goff, the same address, email, phone, and says he founded the business in 1999. Real Producers lists David Goff as Architect / Owner.
visible_gap: Raw category was mismatched as flooring; business is a legitimate service company but should be routed as floor plan services. Multiple public phone variants exist, so use the official/TAE local business phone as primary.
offer_angle: Real-estate floor-plan service SEO/local profile consistency plus website conversion and AI quote/order workflow
